task: Create a JSON policy document that allows read-only access to all S3 buckets for a specific IAM user
solution_criteria: Must include correct IAM policy structure with Version, Statement array, Effect set to Allow, Action for S3 read operations (s3:GetObject, s3:ListBucket), and Resource specifying all S3 buckets and objects

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS ARN string and extracts the resource type (e.g., 'user', 'role', 'bucket')
solution_criteria: Function must parse ARN format correctly, handle different AWS service ARNs, extract the resource type from the appropriate position in the ARN string, and return the resource type as a string

task: Create a regex pattern that validates AWS S3 bucket names according to AWS naming rules
solution_criteria: Regex must enforce: 3-63 characters length, lowercase letters/numbers/hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number, no consecutive hyphens, no IP address format (xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx)
